response.original_title: All Them Witches - Full Performance (Live on KEXP) | May 5, 2017
response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents All Them Witches performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded May 5, 2017.  Songs: Am I Going Up? 3-5-7 Alabaster Talisman The Death Of Coyote Woman  Host: Cheryl Waters Audio Engineer: Filipe De Melo & Kevin Suggs Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Alaia D'Alessandro & Justin Wilmore Live Director: Scott Holpainen Editor: Jim Beckmann
